snippet: To ensure appropriate and effective levels of supervision, the risk assessment should take into account: This section outlines the department’s minimum requirements for staff-student ratios. When planning the staff-student ratios for an excursion, schools: Except where otherwise indicated, all excursions and camps must have a minimum of 2 staff members. Regular class teacher-student ratios with an additional accompanying staff member (as required) 1:20 staff-student ratio with a minimum of 2 staff
